reason: Two brothers stage one unforgettable feast to save their failing restaurant with meticulous flair.
A widowed chef crafts sumptuous Sunday dinners that bind and comfort her daughters.
Sensual cooking scenes link a family’s emotions to the passions of a single feast.
A macabre comedy where a butcher’s shop becomes the stage for darkly delicious storytelling.
A French chef in war-torn Tbilisi strives for culinary excellence amid romance and turmoil.
A flamboyant thief and gourmet restaurateur’s wife spar over power, passion, and lavish banquets.
A pig’s journey to becoming a champion shepherd ties homely farm life to heartfelt feasts.
Poetic longing unfolds in poetry and desire rather than pots and pans — sensually meticulous.
A macabre comedy where a butcher’s shop becomes the stage for darkly delicious storytelling.
A French chef in war-torn Tbilisi strives for culinary excellence amid romance and turmoil.
